description: Core Excel skills the local Ollama planner is expected to demonstrate. This is a reference manual for the planner about which Excel operations exist, what they look like in the command schema, and the typical use case. The planner does NOT execute these; it only emits JSON commands that the action engine executes.

filter_rows.purpose: Return only rows matching a set of conditions, written to a new sheet.
filter_rows.good_example: Filter Enrollment where FAFSA Status equals Missing and Balance Due > 0 into a sheet named 'Missing FAFSA With Balance'.

highlight_rows.purpose: Color rows in place that match conditions. Use for emphasis, not extraction.

sort_rows.purpose: Sort a sheet by one or more columns.

sum_column.purpose: Sum a numeric column. Optionally group by a category.

average_column.purpose: Average a numeric column. Optionally group by a category.

count_rows.purpose: Count rows, optionally filtered by conditions.

count_by_group.purpose: Group rows by a column and count how many fall into each group.

sum_by_group.purpose: Group rows by a category and sum a numeric column within each group.

create_formula.purpose: Write a calculated column or cell-level formula. Supported types include SUM, AVERAGE, COUNT, COUNTIF, SUMIF, IF, IFS, XLOOKUP, VLOOKUP, FILTER, SORT, UNIQUE, CONCAT.

create_chart.purpose: Build a chart from a summary table. Always create the summary first.

create_report.purpose: Build a named report. Typically returned as a multi-step plan rather than a single command.

command_shape.report_type: <one of enrollment_summary, missing_fafsa, outstanding_balance, inactive_withdrawn, program_enrollment, advisor_caseload, registration_status, missing_fafsa_and_balance>

format_report.purpose: Apply Excel formatting (column widths, header style, number formats) to one or more sheets.

detect_missing_values.purpose: Identify blanks, missing FAFSA, missing advisor, etc. and write the result to a new sheet.

remove_duplicates.purpose: Remove duplicate rows based on the listed key columns. Never silently delete originals — write deduped copy to output_sheet.

move_rows_to_sheet.purpose: Copy rows matching conditions into a new sheet. Never deletes from the source — copies only.

create_summary_sheet.purpose: Build a multi-metric summary sheet (total counts, totals, missing counts) in one place.

column_mapping_request.purpose: Ask the user to confirm or pick a column when the planner can't safely resolve a concept (e.g., user said 'major' but the workbook has both 'Program' and 'Department').
